name: minigame-1-multiplayer
description: Dino Hole Rampage multiplayer server and client

scripts.apk:init: npm run prepare:mobile-web && npx cap add android
scripts.apk:sync: npm run prepare:mobile-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:open: npm run apk:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.apk:assemble:debug: npm run apk:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:assemble:release: npm run apk:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
